text:
Created attachment 223714
Update amdgpu firmwares to the latest

This patch updates the port to the latest firmwares for amdgpu (c82cb46356fe).

https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/firmware/linux-firmware.git/commit/?id=c82cb46356fe72832d56554f31c9cd94608a5dd9
